chain_of_thought_evaluation.Q1_analysis: The authors provide a link to the GitHub repository containing the code used in the evaluation.
chain_of_thought_evaluation.Q2_analysis: The evaluation uses physical testbeds (real hardware deployment) and emulations (e.g., Mininet with real network stacks).
chain_of_thought_evaluation.Q3_analysis: A clear, explicit section detailing the 'Fault Model' is presented, stating precise assumptions (e.g., asynchronous network, up to f Byzantine nodes).
chain_of_thought_evaluation.Q4_analysis: The paper provides a rigorous, data-driven analysis of the performance trade-offs (e.g., quantifying the exact cost of replication, checkpointing overhead, or energy consumption).
